word: G761 - ἀσάλευτος - asáleutos - as-al'-yoo-tos - Which cannot be moved

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Which cannot be moved
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adjective / பெயரடை
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G1 (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G4531; unshaken, that is, (by implication) immovable (figuratively): - which cannot be moved, ummovable.
